revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: remove obsolete category Disestablishments-by-century templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=DisestablishmentsInCenturyBC here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=DisestablishmentsInCenturyBC for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Category series navigation}}
{| class="toccolours" style="margin: 1em auto 1em auto"
|{{Category link if exists|{{{3}}}-century BC disestablishments|←}} '''[[{{{2}}} century BC|{{{2}}}-century BC]] disestablishments''' {{Category link if exists|{{{4}}}-century BC disestablishments|→}}
|}

{{Category explanation|organizations, places, or other things that ended or were disestablished in the [[{{{2}}} century BC]]}}<noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
